title: stenopadus colveei
intro: Stenopadus colveei, also known as the "African Wormwood", is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Stenopadus colveei lie in its antimalarial and antipyretic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever and malaria. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of malaria, and even show potential in treating certain types of cancer. Stenopadus colveei can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is often used in traditional African medicine to treat various ailments.
